meaning: n.保险精算师,保险(业务)计算员
examples: Prudential Financial Inc. recently quintupled actuary referral awards to $5,000.
An actuary is a business professional who analyzes the financial consequences of risk.
And, as the CMS actuary points out, the ACA will increase national health care expenditures.
"I still have those images in my mind, " said Dubner, 55, an actuary in Atlanta.
The actuary found that the accounts would provide substantially better benefits than today's system does.
